title: Three sentence explanation practice
body: A generated example showing point, example, and next step. Trust impact stays at zero.
practice_prompt: Explain one idea in three short sentences.

title: Proof of a five minute start
body: Example proof: opened a document and wrote the first heading. This is not real member activity.
practice_prompt: Do one five minute useful step.

title: Specific feedback example
body: What was clear: the main point came first. Next step: add one concrete example.
practice_prompt: Write one observation and one useful next step.

title: Name one preference
body: Example practice for stating a low-stakes preference without apologizing first.
practice_prompt: Say one preference and one short reason.

title: Better question rewrite
body: Example proof: changed a stuck question into 'what would unblock the next step?'

title: Feedback on a voice note
body: The opening was clear. Try one pause after the first sentence next time.
practice_prompt: Give feedback that responds to the practice.

title: Small restart
body: Example practice for returning after a gap without making the gap the whole story.
practice_prompt: Do the smallest useful version once today.

title: Boundary sentence proof
body: Example proof: 'I cannot take this on today, but I can review it Friday.'
practice_prompt: Draft one clear and calm boundary.

title: Decision map feedback
body: The options were easy to compare. Next, circle the tradeoff you can accept today.

title: Main point first
body: Example practice for moving the main idea to the first sentence before adding detail.
practice_prompt: Edit one message so the first sentence carries the point.
